summary: The call failed to initiate or proceed with the new patient scheduling workflow; no relevant information was exchanged, and the required appointment scheduling did not occur.

bugs.title: Appointment Scheduling Workflow Not Initiated
bugs.description: The call ended immediately after courtesy phrases and did not address the actual goal of scheduling a new patient appointment.
bugs.why_it_matters: The primary workflow (scheduling a new patient for primary care) was not performed, failing the scenario's success conditions and user goal.
bugs.transcript_evidence: "User: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes." ... "Agent: You're welcome! Have a great day. Goodbye."
bugs.suggested_fix: Ensure the agent recognizes when a call is meant to initiate an appointment scheduling and prompts the user for necessary information rather than ending the conversation prematurely.
